title: Abu Jahl and Other Meccan Dead
description: According to In Humayd-Salamah-Muhammad (ibn Ishaq) -Thawr b. Zayd the mawla of the Banu a1-1311-'Ikrimah the mawld of Ibn 'Abbas-Ibn 'Abbas: also 'Abd Allah b. Ab-I Bakr: Mu'adh b. 'Amr b. al-Jamuh the brother of the Banu Salimah used to say, "When the Messenger of God had finished with his enemy, he gave orders that Abu Jahl should be searched for among the dead, and said, '0 God, let him not have escaped you!" The first man who encountered Abu Jahl was Mu'adh b. 'Amr b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
